infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cenaiva uses your microphone so you can speak restaurant and booking requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cenaiva uses your location to find nearby restaurants.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Cenaiva may use speech recognition to process spoken restaurant and booking requests.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Cenaiva to access your camera so you can capture and post restaurant review snaps.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Cenaiva to access your photos so you can choose a test image when camera preview is unavailable.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Cenaiva uses your location to find nearby restaurants.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Cenaiva uses your location to find nearby restaurants.

plugins.microphonePermission: Cenaiva uses your microphone so you can speak restaurant and booking requests.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Cenaiva may use speech recognition to process spoken restaurant and booking requests.
